content.text: I found the core status, risk, and roadmap files. I'll pull them together for the briefing.

content.content:
Project Helios — Weekly Status Update
Week of 2026-07-06

Overall: ON TRACK (minor risks)

Milestone Progress:
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

Sprint 14 Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

Open Blockers:
1. Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY).
   Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT. Estimated delay: 2-3 days.
2. Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending. Legal reviewing.
   Target resolution: 2026-07-14.

Next milestone: Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

Project Helios — Risk Register
Last reviewed: 2026-07-07 | Owner: Sarah Chen (PM)

ID    Risk Description                             Likelihood  Impact  Score  Mitigation Owner    Status
----  -------------------------------------------  ----------  ------  -----  ------------------  --------
R-01  Meridian source data quality issues           High        High    9      Amir Hassan         Active — date format blocker confirmed in sprint 14
R-02  GeoSync license not renewed before demo       Medium      High    6      Raj Patel           Active — legal review in progress, due 2026-07-14
R-03  Dashboard performance on large datasets       Medium      High    6      Derek Okafor        Active — benchmark task HEL-247 not yet started
R-04  UAT timeline slippage                        High        Medium  6      Sarah Chen          Active — 1-week extension already consumed
R-05  Key person dependency: Derek Okafor           Low         High    3      Sarah Chen          Monitored — no backup tech lead identified
R-06  Meridian IT environment access delays        Medium      Medium  4      Nadia Petrov        Active — awaiting IT infrastructure diagram
R-07  Scope creep from Meridian feature requests   Low         Medium  2      Raj Patel           Monitored — 3 informal requests logged, not yet escalated
R-08  Cloud cost overrun                           Low         Low     1      Nadia Petrov        Monitored
R-09  Third-party API deprecation (non-GeoSync)    Very Low    Medium  1      Olivia Brooks       Monitored

Project Helios — Q3 Roadmap
INTERNAL DRAFT — Not for client distribution
Last updated: 2026-07-06

Q3 2026 Priorities:

1. COMPLETE SYSTEM INTEGRATION (July)
   - Finalize data ingestion module (target: 2026-07-18)
   - Complete client dashboard v1 (target: 2026-07-22)
   - Integration test sign-off (target: 2026-07-25)

2. PRODUCT DEMO FOR MERIDIAN (July 25)
   - Live data ingestion demonstration using Meridian sample data
   - End-to-end pipeline walkthrough
   - Dashboard visualization with real data (per contract Section 9.3)

3. USER ACCEPTANCE TESTING — MERIDIAN GROUP (August 17-28)
   - Deploy to UAT environment
   - Support Meridian user testing sessions
   - Address UAT feedback (budget: 2 sprints)

4. PERFORMANCE HARDENING (August-September)
   - Dashboard load time target: <2 seconds for 100k records
   - Ingestion throughput benchmarking (target: 500k records/min sustained)
   - External security penetration test (vendor TBD)

5. LAUNCH PREPARATION (September)
   - Production environment setup and runbook documentation
   - Hypercare plan finalization (30-day post-launch model)
   - Final client training sessions

Target launch date: 2026-10-01
Key risk: UAT slippage of >2 weeks pushes launch into Q4, triggering Section 7.1 penalty review.

Proposed Q3 feature additions (subject to change control approval):
- Scheduled ingestion jobs (cron-based triggers)
- Email alerting for pipeline failures
- Self-service mapping rule editor (deferred from Q2)

Project Helios — Q2 Deliverables Checklist

[DONE]      Requirements documentation v1.0
[DONE]      System architecture design
[DONE]      API gateway implementation
[DONE]      Development environment setup
[DONE]      Data schema finalization
[IN-PROGRESS] Data ingestion module (target: 2026-07-18)
[IN-PROGRESS] Client dashboard v1 (target: 2026-07-22)
[OVERDUE]   Integration test suite setup (was due 2026-06-30; rescheduled to 2026-07-20)
[OVERDUE]   UAT environment provisioning (was due 2026-07-01; blocked by Meridian IT access)
[OVERDUE]   Performance benchmarking report (was due 2026-07-05; owner: Derek Okafor)

Meeting Notes: Project Helios / Meridian Group Sync
Date: 2026-07-08
Attendees: Sarah Chen (NovaBridge PM), Derek Okafor (NovaBridge Tech Lead),
           Priya Kapoor (Meridian IT Lead), James Whitfield (Meridian Project Sponsor)

Decisions:
1. Demo date confirmed: 2026-07-25 (product demo for Meridian stakeholders)
2. Meridian will provide clean sample dataset by 2026-07-15 to unblock date format issue
3. UAT period extended by 1 week (now Aug 17-28)

Action Items:
- NovaBridge: Resolve GeoSync license before demo (owner: Derek Okafor, due 2026-07-14)
- NovaBridge: Send draft demo agenda to Meridian by 2026-07-18 (owner: Sarah Chen)
- Meridian: Share IT infrastructure diagram for integration environment setup
  (owner: Priya Kapoor, due 2026-07-12)

Notes:
- James Whitfield emphasized that the demo must include live data ingestion, not mock data.
- Concern raised about dashboard load times on large datasets. Derek to benchmark before demo.
- Priya Kapoor confirmed Meridian IT will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.

content.text: I've gathered the key updates on progress, risks, deliverables, and Q3 plans. Now I'll draft the comprehensive health briefing.

input.content:
NovaBridge — Project Helios — Project Health Briefing
Prepared for Leadership Team | Date: Week of 2026-07-06/08
Sources: Weekly Status 07-06, Risk Register 07-07, Q3 Roadmap Draft, Q2 Checklist, Meridian Sync 07-08

================================================================
1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
================================================================
Overall Status: ON TRACK (minor risks). Core infrastructure (API gateway) delivered 100%. Data ingestion (85%) and client dashboard (60%) are in progress toward July integration targets. Two active blockers (Meridian data formats, GeoSync license renewal) with short-term resolution paths.

Critical watch: 3 Q2 deliverables overdue, UAT environment provisioning blocked by Meridian IT, and performance benchmarking not started. Any UAT slippage >2 weeks pushes launch beyond 2026-10-01 target and triggers Section 7.1 penalty review per Q3 roadmap.

================================================================
2. CURRENT PROGRESS
================================================================
Milestone Progress (as of 2026-07-06):
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete — target completion 2026-07-18
- API gateway: 100% complete (DELIVERED)
- Client dashboard v1: 60% complete — target completion 2026-07-22
- Integration testing: 40% complete
- Next milestone: Integration Test Sign-off target 2026-07-25

Sprint 14 Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

Q2 Deliverables Checklist:
[DONE] Requirements documentation v1.0, System architecture design, API gateway implementation, Dev environment setup, Data schema finalization
[IN-PROGRESS] Data ingestion module, Client dashboard v1
[OVERDUE] 
 - Integration test suite setup (was due 2026-06-30, rescheduled to 2026-07-20)
 - UAT environment provisioning (was due 2026-07-01, blocked by Meridian IT access — now expected 2026-07-19 per meeting notes)
 - Performance benchmarking report (was due 2026-07-05, owner: Derek Okafor)

Blockers (Active):
1. Meridian source data inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs MM/DD/YYYY). Meridian to provide clean sample dataset by 2026-07-15 (per 07-08 meeting, owner Priya Kapoor) and IT infrastructure diagram by 2026-07-12. Estimated delay 2-3 days.
2. GeoSync v2.1 mapping library license renewal pending Legal review, due 2026-07-14, owner Derek Okafor / Raj Patel.

Meridian Sync (2026-07-08) Outcomes:
- Demo date confirmed: 2026-07-25
- Meridian sponsor (James Whitfield) emphasized demo must include LIVE data ingestion, not mock data — aligns with contract Section 9.3 requirement in roadmap.
- UAT window extended by 1 week to Aug 17-28 (1-week extension already consumed per risk register).

================================================================
3. KEY RISKS
================================================================
From Risk Register (Last reviewed 2026-07-07, Owner Sarah Chen):

High Priority (Score 6-9):
R-01 [Score 9 - High/High] Meridian source data quality issues — Active. Date format blocker confirmed Sprint 14. Mitigation: Amir Hassan, plus Meridian clean dataset due 07-15.
R-02 [Score 6 - Med/High] GeoSync license not renewed before demo — Active. Legal review in progress due 07-14. Owner Raj Patel / Derek Okafor.
R-03 [Score 6 - Med/High] Dashboard performance on large datasets — Active. Benchmark task HEL-247 not started; concern raised in leadership sync; dashboard load time target <2s for 100k records. Owner Derek Okafor.
R-04 [Score 6 - High/Med] UAT timeline slippage — Active. 1-week extension already consumed. Further slippage risks launch.
R-06 [Score 4 - Med/Med] Meridian IT environment access delays — Active. Awaiting infrastructure diagram. Owner Nadia Petrov.

Monitored:
R-05 [Score 3] Key person dependency: Derek Okafor — no backup tech lead identified.
R-07 [Score 2] Scope creep — 3 informal Meridian requests logged, not yet escalated.
R-08, R-09 Low priority (cloud cost overrun, third-party API deprecation).

================================================================
4. UPCOMING Q3 COMMITMENTS
================================================================
Per Q3 Roadmap Draft (INTERNAL, updated 2026-07-06) — Target launch 2026-10-01:

July 2026 — Complete System Integration:
 - Finalize data ingestion module (07-18)
 - Complete dashboard v1 (07-22)
 - Integration test sign-off (07-25)
 - Send draft demo agenda to Meridian by 07-18 (Sarah Chen)

July 25 — PRODUCT DEMO FOR MERIDIAN (contractual):
 - Live data ingestion demo using Meridian sample data
 - End-to-end pipeline walkthrough
 - Dashboard visualization with real data (Section 9.3)

August 17-28 — User Acceptance Testing (Meridian Group):
 - Deploy to UAT environment (requires Meridian IT provisioning by 07-19)
 - Support testing sessions, address feedback (budget: 2 sprints)

Aug-Sept — Performance Hardening:
 - Dashboard <2 sec for 100k records
 - Ingestion throughput target 500k records/min sustained
 - External security penetration test (vendor TBD)

September — Launch Preparation:
 - Production environment setup + runbook
 - 30-day hypercare plan finalization
 - Final client training

Proposed additions (pending change control):
- Scheduled ingestion jobs (cron)
- Email alerting for pipeline failures
- Self-service mapping rule editor (deferred from Q2)

================================================================
5. ISSUES NEEDING LEADERSHIP ATTENTION
================================================================
1. Overdue deliverables staffing: Integration test suite and performance benchmarking both overdue and both involve Derek Okafor as critical path. Recommend backup tech lead assignment to reduce R-05.
2. GeoSync legal: License must be cleared by 07-14 to support 07-25 demo. Needs Legal escalation if not resolved by 07-12.
3. Meridian IT dependency: UAT provisioning overdue since 07-01, now dependent on client deliverables (diagram by 07-12, access by 07-19). PM to maintain daily follow-up; leadership support to Priya Kapoor may be needed.
4. Performance risk: HEL-247 benchmarking not started yet demo success depends on dashboard performance. Recommend prioritizing before demo.
5. Contract risk: Launch delay >2 weeks triggers Section 7.1 penalty review. Current 1-week UAT extension consumed leaves no buffer.
6. Demo readiness: Requirement for live data (not mock) increases dependency on resolution of Blocker #1 and receipt of clean dataset by 07-15.

Recommended Actions for Leadership:
- Approve contingency for GeoSync alternative if renewal stalls.
- Assign secondary tech lead for dashboard/performance track.
- Review budget for additional 2-week buffer if UAT slips again.
- Confirm Legal priority on GeoSync.

================================================================
End of Briefing

content.text:
A comprehensive project health briefing has been created and saved as **project_health_briefing.txt**.

The briefing includes:

**1. Current Progress:** Overall ON TRACK status, milestone completion (API gateway 100%, ingestion 85%, dashboard 60%, integration testing 40%), Sprint 14 goals, Q2 deliverables status (3 overdue items), and active blockers with Meridian dependencies.

**2. Key Risks:** All 9 risks from the risk register prioritized, with focus on high-score risks: data quality (R-01), GeoSync license (R-02), dashboard performance (R-03), UAT slippage (R-04), and key-person dependency on Derek Okafor.

**3. Upcoming Q3 Commitments:** July integration completion (07-18/07-22/07-25), July 25 product demo requirement for live data per Section 9.3, Aug 17-28 UAT, Aug-Sept performance hardening targets (<2s for 100k records, 500k/min ingestion), and September launch prep toward Oct 1 launch.

**4. Leadership Attention:** Legal escalation for GeoSync by 07-14, need for backup tech lead, Meridian IT dependency management, performance benchmarking prioritization, and contract Section 7.1 penalty risk if UAT slips >2 weeks.

Source files used: project_helios_status.txt, risk_register.txt, q3_roadmap_draft.txt, q2_deliverables_checklist.txt, and meeting_notes_2026_07_08.txt.
